titleStmt.title: SII 5.704: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 704. (A.R. No. 140 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrīman ma hāmaṇṭaleśva ra catucamuttiṟātipati śrīman catācivatevama hārāyar piṟutuvīrācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 6 10 6- ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa kuṟoticaṅvaṟcarattu mīṉanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu
Uttuvānat tuvāteciyum comavāramum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭāti nakṣatra ttu nāḷ virappiṟatāpa śrīma nu makāmaṇṭaleśva ra Irāma Irāja viṭṭalatevamakāirājar coḻamaṇṭalattu kāveritirattu teṉkāl Uyyakkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiramūrnāṭṭut tiruviṭaimarutūr
tiruviṭaimarutūruṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku taṟmacilāśā sanam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi marutappar tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāy pūṟuvam naṭanta puttuāṟṟukku vaṭakku Āvaṇamum ciṟṟāṭiyum Inta Iraṇṭu kiṟāmamum
pūṟuvam koyiṟpaṟṟāka naṭakkayile Aṉṉāḷile paṇṭāravāṭaikāṟar kaṭṭikkoṇṭu paṇṭāravāṭaiākap pokaiyil Ippoḻutu Itu kāriyamāka tiruviṭaimarutūruṭaiya tampirāṉār tirukkoyil
tevakaṉmikaḷil tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭar maṅkāmaṟkāttār Iṉṉayiṉār koyiṟpaṟṟu Eṉṟu namakku viṇṇappam ceytu nām tiruvaṭiperile taṇṭu vanta poḻutu nammuṭane
kūṭa teṟku Aṉantacayanam vaṭakku mutukallu sahitamākat taṇṭupaṇṇi pūṟuvam koyiṟpaṟṟu Eṉṟu palakālum namakku viṇṇappam ceytu nāmum Antak kiṟāmaṅkaḷile marutappar muttarai
Ellaikkallu niṟkaṟatu Uṇṭo Eṉṟu nammuṭa muttirai vaāṅki Iliṅkayar maṉuṣaraiyum tūḷinayiṉāraiyum nām mutukallile Iruntu tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭar coṉṉāppole Ellaik kallu
niṟkuto Eṉṟu pāṟka Aṉuppi varakkāṭṭi vicārittu pūṟuvam koyiṟpaṟṟu Eṉkiṟattukku Iraṇṭu Ūrilum kallu niṟkutu Eṉṟu pāttu vantu namakku viṇṇappam ceykaiyil nāmum Antappaṭikku
Irāyasamum vāṅkik kuṭuttu caṅkiṟamapuṇṇiyakaālattile tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭar kaiyile Utakam paṇṇikkuṭuttu nammuṭa IrāyasamumThis inscription is left unfinished.
Digital edition of SII 5.704 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
